name: Soccer Ball
hint: A round ball used in the sport of soccer, typically black and white.

name: Basketball
hint: A round ball used in the sport of basketball, typically orange with black lines.

name: Ping Pong Ball
hint: A small ball used in the sport of table tennis, typically white or orange.

name: Baseball
hint: A round ball used in the sport of baseball, typically white with red stitching.

name: Volleyball
hint: A round ball used in the sport of volleyball, typically white or colored.

name: Golf Ball
hint: A small ball used in the sport of golf, typically white with dimples.

name: Cricket Ball
hint: A hard ball used in the sport of cricket, typically red or white.

name: Rugby Ball
hint: An oval-shaped ball used in the sport of rugby, typically brown or black.

name: Bowling Ball
hint: A heavy ball used in the sport of bowling, typically with finger holes.

name: Football
hint: A prolate spheroid ball used in the sport of American football, typically brown or team-colored.
